posts.author: jbowman (Jeff Bowman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m adding a new email integration to my board (which will eventually replace another email integrations) but notice that I can’t tell which integration goes to for which email account.

It would be great if there were some indication of which email account is being used for each integration.

image736×335 22.9 KB

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jbowman - You can use the little description field that is above the integration recipe to make notes to yourself, like which email account it’s for: Image 2022-01-15 at 8.29.11 PM

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP

posts.author: kathy-qcb (Kathy Cunningham)
posts.cookedHtml: I am having this same issue too! It is difficult to tell which GMail account is tied to the integration. The suggested workaround does help, but it requires yet another onboarding step to explain to collaborators how to set up an integration.
